_comment: Trace rt_sigaction(SIGCHLD) calls. Break at x64_handle_syscall call site. At that point: [RSP]=syscall_num, [RSP+8]=frame_ptr. In the PtRegs frame: rdi(+112)=signum, rsi(+104)=act_ptr. Condition: syscall==13 AND signum==17.

steps.name: find_sigchld_sigaction
steps._comment: Break at every syscall entry, filter for rt_sigaction(SIGCHLD). The condition checks RAX==13 at syscall_entry.
